reviews.review_description: I have eight 360 videos which are recorded in 5.7k for a better quality.. now when I play the videos one by one through hotspots, it plays fine for a minute and then it stops.. I have to clear the app data in storage again and again.. that's very frustrating.. please help..

I mean, never did. I Installed it and ran it with my surprise, it just doesn't load the tours I copied in the 3dvista folder. I tried on MQ2 and did fine. Is it there any solution? I am used to my OQ1, it's a pitty my favorite App 3dvista just dont work.
Since March 23 the App won’t open any more in the headset and I can’t figure out why. Last December it works very well. Can anybody tell me why?

developer_response.body:
If the app closes immediately after launch, this issue is caused by a Meta limitation on the number of headsets you can use an app on with the same user account.
Please try clearing the app data (in Settings > Storage) and the app should work on that device.

reviews.review_description: This keeps crashing and is not transferring files.

I got this to use with my 3DVista software to create and view virtual tours. The software is great with so many options without being too hard to use. The app loads up quick and is easy to use. I couldn't load up 360 videos from my Insta360 One X 2 camera(still trying different save settings), but I found from the net that Virtual Desktop can play 360 videos from your PC. It works and saves me from having to load video files onto my 64GB Oculus Quest One.
Works great and simplifies a lot VR viewing from 3DVista Projects.

3d vista help desk solved my problem in one day. Thank you so much!!!

I need urgent help!!! I made a 3svista file which works in windows perfectly. Then I copied the published file inside my metaquest3 in a folder named 3dvista. When I opened the 3d vista vr app in my quest, I can see my file. When I click on it, it shows me the 3dvista vr loading screen but doesnt load my vr folder since 10 mins. I am still waiting. My file is only one gb. When I redo all the process, same thing happen. What should I do?

I was concerned I’d have to keep my tours hosted to access the VR.  No clue what the reviewer Nikontheroad is talking about.  The app works perfectly.  Just don’t forget to eject the oculus from your PC after transferring the tour.  Thank you Jose, and everyone else at 3DVista.  You guys rock

Hi
After updating the headset and app, tour music doesn't play atoumaticly.
Fortheremore, is there any way to change the field of view? After updating the headset and app, pictures seem to be very close.
I realy like the 3dvista, but its disapointed for the quest. This app does nothing more then Just use the browser. There would so much possible for the quest, why reject this?
Few days ago worked not working at all!!!!

My experience with the 3DVista VR App left much to be desired. While initially excited to explore immersive panoramas, I was quickly dismayed by a significant flaw: flickering edge images reminiscent of outdated VHS recordings from the '90s.
The persistent flickering detracted from the immersion promised by VR technology, making it challenging to fully engage with the virtual environments. Despite the app's potential, this fundamental issue severely impacted my enjoyment.
Until the developers address and rectify this flaw, I've opted to utilize the web version of VR for viewing my panoramas. It's disappointing that such a promising app falls short due to this oversight.
In conclusion, while the 3DVista VR App holds promise, the presence of flickering edges undermines its effectiveness. Until this issue is resolved, I recommend seeking alternative platforms like the Web version for a truly immersive VR experience.
No idea why the app isn't responding on my new oculus quest 2 device. It was working great on my previous device just few days ago. What happened?

developer_response.body:
If the app closes immediately after launch, this issue is caused by a Meta limitation on the number of headsets you can use an app on with the same user account.
Please try clearing the app data (in Settings > Storage) and the app should work on that device.

developer_response.body:
If the app closes immediately after launch, this issue is caused by a Meta limitation on the number of headsets you can use an app on with the same user account.
